Description: Determine your healthiest weight range based on height, gender, and body composition.
Target keywords: Ideal, Weight, Calculator, Target, Fitness, health calculator, wellness tool
Best SEO notes: Use clinical, privacy-first health metric language; emphasize instant results, WHO/CDC standards, and no signup required.
